theorems.paper_name: Exact mean ranking on separable trap
Uniform concentration for one generation
theorems.note: Two-sided Hoeffding with 128n² constant fully proven in GapClosureSolutions.lean via upper/lower tail splitting and union bound. hoeffding_batch_sample_complexity derives the algebraic 1/4 failure bound.

theorems.paper_name: Ideal EA runtime O(n log n)
theorems.note: 2026-06-10: vacuous level_based_gen_bound REMOVED; replaced by ideal_runtime_real (expected_generations_ennreal ≤ 4e n², λ ≥ 9+7 ln n). Offspring-only kernel; comma bridge in ideal_runtime_real_comma (M1b, μ=λ degenerate only).

theorems.paper_name: Batch-evaluation runtime O(n log n)
missing: UnifiedPaperValidation capstone still wires vacuous batch_coea_coupled_runtime
theorems.note: 2026-06-10 M5-real target: m5_runtime_transfer_real (h_ideal + budget, no kernel_eq). Legacy drift path m5_batch_coea_coupled_runtime under PopulationKernelPotentialDrift. SimulationCoupling.batch_coea_coupled_runtime remains vacuous ∃-bound for capstone compatibility.

theorems.paper_name: Simultaneous convergence
theorems.note: Epoch decomposition, geometric restart, reservoir persistence, and pathwise conditional independence all proven. coupling_epoch_success is a theorem.

theorems.paper_name: Pure-saddle ranking separation
theorems.note: Witness veto interaction fully proven: Δj=2, Δi=-4, min-drop ≤ -4, interaction gap 3(n-1). T_n case split and unique saddle covered by trap_fitness_all_ones_optimal.

theorems.paper_name: FIFO trap obstruction A/n^d
theorems.note: Algebraic bound A·d·(1/n)·(1-1/n)^(n-1) fully derived from sbm_transition_prob. Distance monotonicity proven in GapClosureSolutions.

theorems.paper_name: Witness non-aggregation (veto effect)
ε-separable approximate offset 2ε bound
Conditional LBT runtime for noiseless Hamming selection
missing: Paper-track G1/G2 with constant δ (proved chain uses coupling δ=1/n)
theorems.note: Coupling track (proved): γ₀=1/4, δ=1/n, λ≥r_local_lambda_min=Θ(n² log n), runtime sum Θ(n³·λ) via exact_hamming_runtime_sum_coupling. Paper track (documented): r_local_lambda_min_paper, exact_hamming_sel_G3_paper_holds, c_pop; headline O(n log n) when λ=Θ(log n). Does NOT close Conjecture 2.

theorems.paper_name: finite-sample comma-kernel runtime in the log-ratio mean-zero regime
theorems.note: Proves noisy batch comma-kernel runtime <= 4B in the log-ratio/horizon/K-large/mean-zero regime. Does not prove the original constant-ratio/general r-local Conjecture 2.

theorems.paper_name: r-local runtime with batch-estimator selection
missing: constant-ratio runtime from lambda / mu >= c_sel > 4
theorems.note: R2/log-ratio variant is now REAL_PROVEN as conjecture2_R2_unconditional_logratio. The original paper conjecture remains open and structurally doubtful for constant selection ratio and fully general r-local epsilon < 1/r because of multi-coordinate comparison geometry.

theorems.paper_name: Selection amplification on A_{≥j+1}
theorems.note: Faithful ConditionG2_Corus for noiseless exact_hamming_sel_kernel via sel_g2_corus_real_bound.

theorems.paper_name: Exact-Hamming selection coupling G2
theorems.note: Proves file-internal ConditionG2_coupling (shrinkage tolerance). Corus amplification is exact_hamming_sel_G2_Corus. Alias r_local_G2 retained.

theorems.paper_name: Batch estimator respects fitness gap (Theorem 7)
Halved unscaled drift floor via mutation_prob_lower_bound
theorems.note: Chains mutation_prob_ge_paper_G1_unscaled (L703) + min_halves_nonneg into r_local_z_corus floor min{1/(2en),1/8}. Population upgrade: coea_measure_ge_half_z_star_corus.

theorems.paper_name: coea_measure ≥ (1/2)·z_* from count threshold
G3 with constant δ and c_sel > 4
theorems.note: Paper track: r_local_gamma0_of_csel, r_local_delta_of_csel, r_local_lambda_min_paper, r_local_c_pop_of_csel. Coupling track remains default for G1/G2/runtime theorem.

theorems.paper_name: Real ideal runtime, offspring kernel: E[T] <= 4e n^2 for lambda >= 9+7 ln n
theorems.note: 2026-06-10: conclusion in ENNReal via expected_generations_ennreal; kernel = ideal_hamming_offspring_kernel (offspring-only pipeline, parent at best level). M1b: population_best_hamming_select_mu + ideal_runtime_real_comma. Eval cost: ideal_runtime_eval_cost. Hypothesis lambda >= 9+7 ln n is the paper G3 shape.

theorems.paper_name: Comma bridge (mu=lambda degenerate): best(select_mu pool) = best(pool)
theorems.note: DEGENERATE ONLY: mu=lambda means offspring pipeline, NOT mu<lambda comma selection. population_best_hamming_select_mu retains pool argmax; ideal_runtime_real_comma repackages M1 at same 4e n^2 constants. Parametric M5/M6 may instantiate this until M9.

theorems.paper_name: Paper comma kernel: batch_fhat_coea_sel_kernel with explicit finite seed space
theorems.note: 2026-06-10 planner ACCEPT: CommaEASeed + comma_seed_prob + batch_fhat_comma_step + PMF kernel; ideal_f_coea_sel_kernel twin; canonical coupling built in.

theorems.paper_name: Level-count comma selection: equal index sets under level-respecting scores
theorems.note: Combinatorial core only (no probability). Wired into M4 scaffold m4_comma_step_coupling_land.

theorems.paper_name: One-generation step coupling on concentration event
missing: Finset bad-seed PMF union bound for general F_hat
theorems.note: 2026-06-10: m4_step_coupling + m4_comma_step_coupling_onemax_pure (OneMax + pure batch score, F_hat=f). m4_comma_step_coupling_onemax_concentration with explicit F_hat flatness. m4_comma_good_seed_prob_ge (PMF mass=1). Failure cert m4_comma_per_generation_failure_cert (B=1).

theorems.note: 2026-06-11: M5-real chain closed (0 sorry). hit_prob_within + T1 m5_kernel_expectation_domination + T2 m5_noisy_hit_prob_ge_quarter + T3 m5_expected_generations_bound_of_hit_prob + m5_comma_disagree_mass_le_eps_of_budget (M4 PMF union, h_mean_zero + h_step_agree_on_good) + capstone m5_runtime_transfer_real (h_ideal + budget, no has_pure/h_kernel_eq/h_onemax). theorems.note: T2 real probability statement (m5_noisy_hit_prob_ge_quarter); disagree mass bound proved 2026-06-11.

missing: Step coupling without within-level F_hat flatness
theorems.note: conjecture2_R2_epsilon_valid (eps < 1/(4r)); r_local_effective_margin_gt_fhat_tolerance; m4_comma_step_coupling_r_local; conjecture2_R2_runtime; m6_conjecture2_R2_assembly bundles margin + step coupling + expected_generations_ennreal_pop <= 4B under drift (no vacuous exists epoch).

theorems.note: 2026-06-10 M8b: ideal_phi_log + uniform delta=1 M0; ideal_offspring_improve_prob_ge_level (frontier I2); ideal_runtime_log_sum_sharp; ideal_runtime_log_real is official ideal capstone. Conditional m8_ideal_runtime_log assembly deleted.

level_based_theorem.note: Trusted axiom on Corus-faithful G1/G2/G3. Coupling preconditions proved separately; not interchangeable.

negative_drift_theorem.note: Existential witness via exp bound. Full measure-theoretic OST proof in DriftTheorems/NegativeDrift.lean
